data.title: Breaking: Bitwise Solana Staking ETF (BSOL) Files 8-A to List on NYSE
data.description:
Bitwise Solana Staking ETF (BSOL) gears up for listing as the issuer submitted an amended 8-A filing with the U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The final deadline for the US SEC to decide on Bitwise’s BSOL exchange-traded fund (ETF) was October 16, which got delayed due to the prolonged U
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/10/23/breaking-bitwise-solana-staking-etf-bsol-files-8-a-to-list-on-nyse/

data.title: Base Chain Activity Jumps 22.5%, But Bitcoin Hyper is the Only Layer-2 With Solana Speed, Bitcoin Security
data.description:
The Base network’s 22. 5% climb in transactions month-over-month stands out amid a broader slowdown across the Layer-2 space, but Bitcoin Hyper (HYPER) is quickly becoming the one to watch. While the two aren’t direct competitors, as Base runs on Ethereum (ETH) while Bitcoin Hyper is being built on Bitcoin (BTC), they share a similar mission: […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/base-activity-up-22-5-bitcoin-hyper-solana-speed/

data.title: Dogecoin RSI Breakout Shows Main Target, Why $1 Is Still Possible
data.description:
Dogecoin is getting attention again after crypto analyst Shan Specter shared a new chart on X. In the post, Specter said Dogecoin is showing a green bullish dot on the daily chart, along with an RSI breakout. He described the move as “incredible” and said the coin looks ready to rise again. His chart shows that Dogecoin is now breaking past a level that had been holding it down for a while
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/dogecoin/dogecoin-rsi-breakout-1/

data.title: Binance Founder Changpeng Zhao Receives Pardon From President Trump
data.description:
U. S. President Donald Trump has granted Binance founder Changpeng Zhao a pardon, marking the latest clemency for the crypto industry from the pro-crypto administration.
source: https://zycrypto.com/binance-founder-changpeng-zhao-receives-pardon-from-president-trump/

data.title: To hedge with gold, you’ll need more than nerves—you’ll need time
data.description:
This Tuesday hit like a freight train for anyone who bought gold this year, thinking it was some magic shield, when prices saw their biggest single-day drop in 12 years, Cryptopolitan reported. It was a brutal reality check for investors hoping gold would instantly save them when markets went south. But the crash doesn’t cancel […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/to-hedge-with-gold-youll-need-time/

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 111,000 USDT with a 2.84% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Oct 23, 2025, 17:48 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 111,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 111,000 USDT, with a narrowed 2.84% increase in 24 hours.
